description: 50-question pilot retrieval benchmark for CBSE Class 10 Math + Science

questions.question: State the Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic.
questions.subject: mathematics

questions.question: Prove that square root of 5 is an irrational number.
questions.subject: mathematics

questions.question: Explain the relationship between HCF and LCM for any two positive integers a and b.

questions.question: Why is the product of a non-zero rational and an irrational number always irrational?
questions.subject: mathematics

questions.question: What is the geometrical meaning of the zeroes of a polynomial?
questions.subject: mathematics

questions.subject: mathematics

questions.question: Find a quadratic polynomial whose sum and product of zeroes are -3 and 2 respectively.

questions.subject: mathematics
